description_long: This is a dark-colored, wide-bottomed bottle with a conical shape that tapers smoothly to a narrow neck. The body is glossy and reflective, suggesting a glass or polished plastic material. On one side, there is a subtle, embossed symbol resembling the Greek letter Psi (Ψ), adding a distinctive visual detail. The neck is cylindrical and appears to lack any visible threads or closure mechanism, giving the top a clean, open look. The surface is smooth and unblemished, with no visible seams or manufacturing marks. The bottle's overall design is simple yet elegant, suitable for decorative or functional use in an urban environment.
description: A glossy, dark conical bottle with a wide base, narrow neck, and an embossed Psi (Ψ) symbol on one side. The surface is smooth and highly reflective.
description_view_0: This view shows the bottle's front with the embossed Psi (Ψ) symbol clearly visible on the body.
description_view_1: The bottle is seen from the side, with no visible symbols or markings, highlighting its smooth, reflective surface.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to view 1, showing the bottle's clean, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_3: The back view of the bottle, also lacking any symbols or markings, emphasizing the uniformity of the material.
attribute_label_or_branding: Embossed Psi (Ψ) symbol on the front, no other visible labels or branding.
